instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.welcomeTitle: Welcome to Your Weekly Time Diary. Thank you for participating!
instructions.studyIntroDefault:
This is our time use study.

We are asking you to reconstruct a typical week of your daily activities using our time use tool.

Which week should I choose? Please think of your past week (the last 7 days).
Exception: If you were sick or on holiday last week, please choose a different recent week that better represents your normal routine.
instructions.timeSavingFeature: Time-Saving Feature: You do not need to start from scratch every day. After you complete the first day, your schedule will automatically copy over to the next day as a template. Please adapt this template to reflect any changes in your activities for that day.
instructions.howToFillTitle: How to fill out the diary
instructions.howToFillDescription: You will see a list of activities at the bottom of the screen. You can drag and drop these activities onto the timeline to indicate what you were doing throughout the day.
instructions.howToFillTwoSteps: You will enter information in two steps for each day:
instructions.mainActivityHelp: Main Activity (Level 1) Drag and drop activities from the activities list onto the time line to show your main activity.
instructions.secondaryActivityHelp: Secondary Activity (Level 2) Use this second timeline only if you were doing two things at once. This is for activities that were happening in the background or simultaneously with your Main Activity, e.g.:

secondaryExamples.media: Media Multitasking: If you were using a second form of media (e.g., listening to a Podcast while Gaming, or checking Social Media while watching TV).
secondaryExamples.other: Other Multitasking: If you were doing a non-digital activity simultaneously (e.g., Reading while Commuting, or Knitting while watching TV).
secondaryExamples.note: Note: If you were focused on only one thing, leave this level blank for that time block.

instructions.visualGuideTitle: Visual Illustrations of how to use the Interface
instructions.startPrompt: Please click the blue Start button to begin your diary entry.
instructions.mainInstruction: Think about the activities you did yesterday. Then, fill in the full timeline with the activities you did.

step1.title: Select and Place an Activity
step1.horizontal: Choose an activity from the menu at the bottom of the screen, then place it on the timeline.
step1.vertical: Tap the (+) button in the bottom right corner to open the activity menu, then select an activity and tap where you want to place it on the timeline.

step2.title: Adjust Activity Duration
step2.horizontal: Click and drag the edges horizontally to set the duration. On desktop, you can also right-click an activity and choose "Show info" or "Delete".
step2.vertical: Drag the edges vertically to set the duration.

step3.title: Submit Your Diary
step3.description: Once you've recorded all your activities for the day, click the Submit button to complete your diary.
step3.submitHelp: Click to submit your completed diary

instructions.cleanRowHelp: Want to start over? Clean the row
instructions.customActivityHelp: Activity not listed? Add a custom activity

confirmSubmit.title: Submit this day?
confirmSubmit.message: You will not be able to change your responses for this day.

confirmSkip.title: Do you really want to skip all time reporting?
confirmSkip.message: You will be taken directly to the thank-you page.

loading.title: Submitting your diary...
loading.message: Please wait while we save your responses.

messages.fillRequired: Please fill in all required activities
messages.timelineMissing: There is information missing from this timeline. Would you like to add anything?
messages.invalidPlacement: Cannot place activity here due to invalid position.
messages.templateLoadedBanner: We loaded your activities from {{day}} as a starting point. Click 'Clean Row' to start fresh or edit the activities below. On mobile, delete a single activity by long-pressing it. On desktop, right-click an activity and choose 'Delete' (or hover and press the DEL or 'd' key).

errors.loadingActivitiesConfigurationHelp: The application requires a valid backend connection to load the appropriate activities for your study.
errors.loadingActivitiesShort: Error loading activities. Please refresh the page to try again. Error:

banner.dayOneInstructions: Usage Instructions: First select an activity from the list below. Then click on the timeline to place it, and drag its borders to extend. To delete an activity on mobile, long-press it for 2 seconds. On desktop, right-click an activity and choose 'Delete' (or hover and press the 'd' key or the DEL key). Right-click also provides 'Show info'.

thankYou.title: Thank You - TRAC
thankYou.heading: Thank You!
thankYou.subtitle: Your submission has been completed successfully.
thankYou.message: Thank you for participating in our TRAC study. Your responses have been recorded and will contribute to valuable research.
